purpose: Machine-readable acceptance definition for eliminating MAS legacy platform residue and for making the OPL-standard-agent hardening work verifiable instead of slogan-complete.
machine_boundary: This contract defines acceptance gates, false-completion rules, evidence classes, and open evidence tails for MAS standard-OPL-agent completion. It does not declare live DM002/DM003 recovery, paper closure, publication readiness, submission readiness, current package freshness, production readiness, physical delete authorization, or OPL family-wide conformance completion.

objective_1.goal: MAS reads as a standard OPL Agent in active source, default entry, generated surface, owner route, recovery, and operator projection paths.
objective_1.non_goal: Do not delete provenance, fixtures, explicit archive imports, body-free domain refs, or minimal medical authority functions that have a current owner boundary.

objective_2.goal: The failure mode found through DM002/DM003 becomes a reusable acceptance standard for future OPL-standard-agent generation and takeover.
objective_2.non_goal: Do not copy MAS-specific paper recovery phases into MAG, RCA, OMA, or OPL substrate.

source_of_truth: fresh study_progress and DHD dry-run for live studies
requires: ordinary progress root is current_owner_delta
paper recovery root is paper_recovery_state
study_progress, DHD provider admission, operator card, intervention lane, operator verdict, recovery/autonomy contract, and user-visible projection derive from the authority root
queue, active_run_id, transport status, operator card, parked runtime, docs-only claim, and stale dispatch are audit-only unless adopted by an owner answer
domain semantics live in agent/ pack refs
machine contracts live in contracts/
minimal medical authority functions are inventoried with owner, active callers, allowed writes, forbidden authority, output refs, cannot-lift reason, and retirement or upcollect target
active src paths do not own generic scheduler, queue, attempt ledger, state-machine runner, generic lifecycle, generic workbench, or generic product wrapper

default CLI/MCP/Skill/product-entry/status/workbench/domain-handler shells are OPL generated or hosted surfaces, domain handler targets, authority functions, refs-only projections, or tombstone/provenance
retired aliases, facades, wrappers, local scheduler, legacy runtime transport, and compatibility entrypoints have no active default caller
new code cannot add compatibility shim, alias, facade, fallback, or private runtime owner
cannot_be_satisfied_by: OPL conformance pass without caller migration proof

requires: provider admission requires strong route identity and attempt idempotency identity
terminal closeout precedence suppresses stale running projection without swallowing different-identity successor
same identity no-progress redrive stops at budget
stop-loss exit requires identity-different successor, owner answer, human gate, route-back evidence, provider hard-gate clearance, or stable typed blocker
record-only refs remain audit unless current identity matches
tests forbid classification-zero, descriptor-ready, generated-ready, conformance-pass, provider-completion, queue-empty, active-run, docs-only, and refs-only-ledger from becoming completion claims
tests assert live recovery needs accepted owner evidence or strict current running proof

source_of_truth: owner receipt / quality gate receipt / stable typed blocker / human gate / route-back evidence / canonical changed surface refs
requires: at least representative DM002/DM003 recovery path exits current blockers through accepted current-identity owner evidence, human/operator gate, or stable typed blocker supersession
paper/deliverable progress and platform repair are accounted separately
no hand-written Yang runtime/study artifacts are used as governed recovery truth
cannot_be_satisfied_by: manual foreground edit not adopted by MAS/OPL
provider completed without MAS closeout consumption

requires: DM002/DM003 failure mode is represented as family-level standard-agent acceptance criteria

OMA and future generated agents must return typed blocker or work order when target owner route, source morphology, generated surface, residue ledger, no-forbidden-write proof, or owner answer shape is missing
domain-specific kernels stay domain-owned while generic substrate stays OPL-owned
cannot_be_satisfied_by: suite pass without target owner receipt or typed blocker

current_open_evidence_tails: physical source morphology scan beyond classification-zero
OPL/OMA family-level standard-agent generation negative conformance
real owner receipt / typed blocker / human gate / route-back scaleout
provider long-soak and operator repair loop evidence
